sections.paragraph:
Original: נחשׁ

Transliteration: nâchâsh

Phonetic: naw-khawsh'

BDB Definition:

Nahash = "serpent"
  1. a king of the Ammonites during the time of king Saul
  2. the father of Abigail, the mother of Amasa, the commander of Absalom's army

Origin: the same as H5175

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
